scope: Connected GitHub repositories, current project files and explicitly surfaced tracker evidence. Hidden or unsynchronised chats are excluded.
completion_rule: Requirement -> Module -> Artifact -> Test or waiver -> Evidence -> Runtime state -> Rollback -> Owner acceptance
denominator_policy: Do not sum tracker percentages with different denominators. Preserve historical rows, assign one canonical task ID per real task and link duplicates or superseded states.

tracker_families.name: Cross-chat Jarvis XRP/HBAR VTI Hub and CFO

external_or_owner_gates.gate: Provider token revocation and secure replacement

safe_repository_work_remaining.next: Implement governed Hub source discovery and API intake on a reviewed branch.
Continue Command Centre adapters and offline truthful status views without claiming runtime proof.
Implement repository-side topology, IAM policy templates, observability schemas, backup/restore and cost guards.
Process accessible archive items into counted source, lineage and QA records.
Extend provenance, model routing, agent/Skill and federation governance registries.
Build XRP/HBAR reconciliation batch 002 from dated sources.
Create Health/Spooky2 source denominator, hash manifest and safety/OJT records without live device control.
Build universal source, evidence, model and cost registry contracts.
Create shared-core workstream manifests and acceptance tests.

prohibited_status_shortcuts: No 100 percent or zero-gap claim from static reports.
No production claim from source code or CI alone.
No clinical or wellness device control.
No automatic installation of external repositories.
